CustomField.description: Display Date and Time down to seconds using Created Date
CustomField.formula: /*Use this formula on timestamp field to display as YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss */ TEXT(YEAR (DATEVALUE(CreatedDate + ($User.UserTimezoneOffset__c/24) ))) & "-" & RIGHT("00" & TEXT(MONTH (DATEVALUE(CreatedDate + ($User.UserTimezoneOffset__c/24) ))),2) & "-" & RIGHT("00" & TEXT(DAY (DATEVALUE(CreatedDate + ($User.UserTimezoneOffset__c/24) ))),2) & " " & RIGHT("00" & TEXT(HOUR (TIMEVALUE(CreatedDate + ($User.UserTimezoneOffset__c/24) ))),2) & ":" & RIGHT("00" & TEXT(MINUTE(TIMEVALUE(CreatedDate + ($User.UserTimezoneOffset__c/24) ))),2) & ":" & RIGHT("00" & TEXT(SECOND(TIMEVALUE(CreatedDate + ($User.UserTimezoneOffset__c/24) ))),2)
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Display Date and Time down to seconds using Created Date
CustomField.label: fxCreatedTime
